promptStandard.philosophie: Implement only what was validated in the design and conversion stages to avoid hallucination.

instructions_systeme.contexte: Generate implementation-ready UI code from the approved dashboard blueprint.
instructions_systeme.methode_pedagogique: Constraint-driven code generation with explicit component mapping and acceptance checks.

contraintes_absolues: RESPECTER la conversion blueprint sans invention.
CONSTRUIRE une interface dashboard propre et premium.
EXPOSER clairement import, pipeline, status, and output panels.
PREVOIR des points de validation visuelle.

sections.contenu_md: string (Markdown with sections: Purpose, Components, File targets, States, Accessibility, Responsive rules, Acceptance criteria, Risks, Handoff)
